name: Oriental Dip
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces can water chestnuts, drained and finely chopped
1 tablespoon chopped green onions, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the mayonnaise and sour cream.
2. Add the drained and finely chopped water chestnuts, pimentos, green onions, beef bouillon granules, Worcestershire sauce, garlic powder, and cayenne pepper.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
4. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
5. Before serving, give the dip a quick stir to redistribute any settled ingredients.
Any 2-cup combination of sour cream, mayonnaise, or drained yogurt may be used instead of mayonnaise and sour cream. Makes about 2 1/2 cups. Per 1/4 cup serving: 54 Kcal, 1.0g fat (0g sat fat), 16% CFF, 355mg Na, 1.0g PRO, 1.0g FAT, 10.5g CHO.
